questions.subject: Current Affairs
questions.prompt: Which of the following statements regarding the implementation mechanisms of the WTO Agreement on Fisheries Subsidies is correct?

options.text: The agreement entered into force immediately upon its adoption at the 12th Ministerial Conference in 2022.
The WTO Fish Fund provides technical assistance to developing countries through mandatory contributions from all members.
The agreement provides 'Special and Differential Treatment' through flexibility in implementation for developing countries.
The agreement prohibits subsidies for all fishing activities conducted within the Exclusive Economic Zones (EEZ) of member states.

questions.explanation: Option C is correct as the agreement includes Special and Differential Treatment for developing countries. Option A is incorrect because it required two-thirds of members to submit instruments of acceptance to enter into force. Option B is incorrect because the Fish Fund is based on voluntary, not mandatory, contributions. Option D is incorrect; it prohibits subsidies for IUU fishing and unregulated high seas, not all fishing in the EEZ.
questions.takeaway: The WTO Fisheries Agreement utilizes voluntary funding and special treatment clauses to facilitate adoption by developing nations.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: The WTO Agreement on Fisheries Subsidies entered into force after two-thirds of WTO members submitted their instruments of acceptance. WTO Fish Fund: Supports developing and least-developed countries in implementation through voluntary contributions.
